name: Syntax node deletion
cAdapter: Parse C into syntax nodes and try deleting whole declarations, statements, expression subtrees, or initializer members.
rustAdapter: Parse Rust into syntax nodes and try deleting items, statements, blocks, match arms, expression subtrees, or attributes when syntax remains valid.
jsAdapter: Parse JavaScript into syntax nodes and try deleting declarations, statements, object members, expression subtrees, or imports.
safetyPredicate: Accept only candidates that parse, are smaller, and pass the benchmark interestingness command.

name: Token or line window deletion
cAdapter: Try deleting contiguous C token windows, balanced-token windows, or lines after syntax recovery/formatting.
rustAdapter: Try deleting contiguous Rust token or line windows, with rustfmt and the interestingness command as the validator.
jsAdapter: Try deleting contiguous JavaScript token or line windows, with parser/formatter validation before oracle execution.
safetyPredicate: Reject unparsable candidates and accept only windows whose deletion preserves interestingness and reduces token count.

name: Compatible subtree replacement
cAdapter: Replace a C expression, statement, or declaration subtree with a smaller compatible subtree from the same context.
rustAdapter: Replace a Rust expression, item, pattern, or block subtree with a smaller syntactically compatible subtree.
jsAdapter: Replace a JavaScript expression, statement, object member, or function body subtree with a smaller compatible subtree.
safetyPredicate: The replacement must parse in the target language and pass the oracle; static compatibility checks are advisory only.

name: Identifier replacement and renaming
cAdapter: Consistently replace or shorten identifiers while respecting scope and avoiding reserved keywords.
rustAdapter: Consistently replace or shorten identifiers while respecting modules, lifetimes, macros, and raw identifiers.
jsAdapter: Consistently replace or shorten local identifiers while avoiding property names and dynamic lookup hazards unless scoped safe.
safetyPredicate: Accept only scope-safe replacements that parse and preserve interestingness.

name: Literal simplification
cAdapter: Shrink integer, floating, character, string, boolean-like, and null pointer literals to smaller representatives.
rustAdapter: Shrink numeric, char, string, bool, option-like, and unit literals while respecting suffixes and type inference.
jsAdapter: Shrink number, string, boolean, null, undefined, array, and object literals without changing syntax class unexpectedly.
safetyPredicate: Literal replacement is accepted only if the candidate parses, is smaller, and keeps the interesting behavior.

name: Unused declaration removal
cAdapter: Remove unused variables, functions, parameters, struct fields, enum members, includes, and declarations when references are absent.
rustAdapter: Remove unused items, locals, parameters, imports, fields, enum variants, and attributes when references are absent.
jsAdapter: Remove unused locals, functions, parameters, imports, object members, and classes when references are absent and dynamic access is not required.
safetyPredicate: Static unused analysis may propose candidates, but only oracle-passing smaller programs are accepted.

name: Copy and constant propagation
cAdapter: Propagate constants or simple aliases through variables, fields, and array accesses, then remove the now-redundant binding.
rustAdapter: Propagate immutable constants or simple aliases when ownership, borrow, and type constraints remain valid.
jsAdapter: Propagate const/let aliases and literal constants when side effects, hoisting, and temporal-dead-zone behavior are not introduced.
safetyPredicate: Only simple side-effect-free bindings are proposed; oracle validation remains the final acceptance gate.

name: Control-flow simplification
cAdapter: Simplify if/else branches, ternary expressions, loop wrappers, break-only loops, and unreachable blocks.
rustAdapter: Simplify if/else, match arms, loop wrappers, early returns, and unreachable blocks while preserving syntactic validity.
jsAdapter: Simplify if/else, conditional expressions, loop wrappers, switch cases, and unreachable blocks with parser validation.
safetyPredicate: Branch or loop simplifications must reduce size and pass the interestingness command.

name: Function and call simplification
cAdapter: Inline small functions, replace a call with a return expression or neutral value, or remove unused call scaffolding.
rustAdapter: Inline small functions/closures or replace calls with compatible expressions when ownership and type checks survive.
jsAdapter: Inline small functions/closures or replace pure calls with compatible expressions when dynamic binding is not required.
safetyPredicate: Treat call rewrites as speculative; accept only after parsing and oracle validation.

name: Wrapper flattening
cAdapter: Remove redundant parentheses, braces, nested blocks, delimiter wrappers, and single-child aggregate wrappers.
rustAdapter: Remove redundant parentheses, blocks, nested expressions, and single-child wrappers while respecting expression/block typing.
jsAdapter: Remove redundant parentheses, blocks, sequence wrappers, and single-child expression wrappers with parser validation.
safetyPredicate: Flattening is accepted only when syntax remains valid, tokens decrease, and the oracle passes.
